title: AMPure purification protocol
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"a3rsh","text":"The protocol below works for 200 μl PCR tubes or plates. If working with 1.5 ml tubes, use larger volumes of EtOH for the washes (step 6 and 7) and Tris/water for the final elution (step 9).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Remove beads from the fridge, equilibrate to the room temperature, mix thoroughly but do not vortex.
Add desired ratio of AMPure beads to the DNA to be purified and mix well by pipetting.
Let it stand for 5 minutes on the rack, aspirate and discard supernatant.
Add 200 μl of freshly prepared 70% EtOH, incubate 30 seconds, aspirate and discard EtOH.
Repeat the wash: add 200 μl of freshly prepared 70% EtOH, incubate 30 seconds, aspirate and discard EtOH.
Wait until the pellet dries out completely. DO NOT remove the plate/tubes from the magnetic rack, as the dried AMPure might pop out from the tubes!
Add desired volume of Tris 10 mM or water, wetting the dried AMPure pellets (add 1 μl to the final volume to avoid pipetting out the beads)
Incubate 10 minutes, incubating in 37°C can improve DNA yield.
Let it stand for 5 minutes, pippete out and save supernatant. The eluted DNA is in the supernatant, do not discard it!
creator: Tomasz Suchan
